description_long: This is a low-top, lace-up sneaker predominantly white in color, featuring a classic Adidas design. The upper is made of smooth leather with small perforations along the sides for ventilation, and the heel tab is gray with a white Adidas trefoil logo. The shoe has a slightly yellowed rubber sole, indicating some age or use, and the interior lining appears to be a dark gray textile. The laces are white and threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern through seven pairs of eyelets. The overall silhouette is streamlined, with a rounded toe and a padded collar for comfort.
description: A white Adidas low-top sneaker with a gray heel tab, perforated leather sides, and a slightly yellowed rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Adidas logo, perforated leather, and the full length of the shoe.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the gray heel tab with the white Adidas trefoil logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the perforated leather and the shoe's profile without visible branding.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded toe, white laces, and tongue.
attribute_logo: White Adidas trefoil logo on the gray heel tab
